top_signals.title: Iranian Crude Exports Surge Via Hormuz as Activity Picks Up
top_signals.summary: Iran has ramped up the amount of oil it sends openly through the Strait of Hormuz to the highest since the war began, as shipping activity picks up while Tehran and Washington seek a lasting peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of England dilutes stablecoin rules with plan for £40bn issuer limit
top_signals.summary: Proposed regulations would no longer restrict holdings by individuals and companies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: French, German Governments Agree to Hold Equal Stakes in KNDS
top_signals.summary: The German and French governments are set to hold equal stakes in KNDS NV, one of Europe’s most important defense companies, as it gears up for an initial public offering in the near future.
